gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands in front of the class, gestures toward the colorful blocks on the screen, and smiles while inviting attention
a tutor raises both arms slightly, moving them outward in excitement as if welcoming eight new blocks to the group
a tutor steps forward, spreading arms wide to demonstrate the combining of groups while encouraging everyone to watch closely
a person leans slightly forward, using one hand to mimic counting the blocks in the air while inviting the class to count together
a tutor nods with enthusiasm, motions to the imaginary blocks, and invites students to count the total with him out loud
a person claps hands together and jumps slightly, celebrating the answer with the class and encouraging everyone to join in
a tutor smiles warmly, extends both hands outward as if applauding the students, and praises their effort in combining blocks
a person nods proudly, points to the class, and gestures as if marking each improvement while encouraging continued practice
